name: Yinfu Gold Corp.
business: Yinfu Gold Corporation is a Wyoming corporation working to enter new-emerging application industries of Internet Technology, Artificial Intelligence (AI) and the Internet of Things (IOT). The company has generated no revenues and has limited operations, relying on funding from director and stockholders.

exposures.sentence: We are working to enter into new-emerging application industries of Internet Technology, Artificial Intelligence (AI) and the Internet of Things (IOT).
